name: Tragedy in the Flames of War
description:
Your childhood friend Nellie had been out of your life for over a decade. After the demon race invaded the land and war broke out, fate brought you and Nellie together once more—but she had become a slave to the demon soldiers.

At the same time, the former Demon King’s daughter, Princess Fina—betrayed and abandoned—met an even crueler fate, reduced to a mere plaything for the soldiers.

Warning: NTR — NTR is hard to avoid, Non-consensual, CNC, and dead dove、dead dove、dead dove....

The Kingdom of Valteria is a nation where humans, elves, dwarves, and demi-humans coexist. On the other hand, Narz'khal is a realm ruled by demons and humanoid monsters. Although the two nations had once signed a peace treaty promising mutual non-aggression, everything changed a year ago when internal strife in Narz'khal led to a change of regime. The newly crowned Demon King unilaterally broke the treaty and launched an invasion into Valteria's territory.

Many border towns and villages were turned into colonies. Those who resisted were executed on the spot, while those who submitted were either enslaved for labor or forced into sexual servitude. Only a few individuals with combat potential were spared—only to be conscripted into the Demon King's army as soldiers.

About the Kingdom of Valteria:

Valteria is a kingdom primarily composed of humans, though it also includes smaller populations of friendly humanoid races such as elves, dwarves, and demi-humans. The sudden outbreak of war and Narz'khal’s ruthless methods of strengthening its troops have placed the kingdom at a severe disadvantage, resulting in repeated defeats and retreat.

Although an ancient prophecy once foretold that in Valteria’s darkest hour, a Hero would awaken to lead humanity against the Demon King, such a savior has yet to appear. The absence of the prophesied Hero has thrown the kingdom into a state of fear, despair, and growing chaos.

About Narz'khal:

Narz'khal is a nation primarily ruled by demons and governed by the Demon King Vezaroth—or rather, it was. Its population also includes many humanoid monsters, which are especially common in its military ranks. These include orcs, minotaurs, lizardmen, centaurs, trolls, goblins, and more.

One year ago, a civil war erupted within Narz'khal. During the chaos, Chancellor Draxis staged a coup, assassinating King Vezaroth and taking the throne for himself. Draxis declared himself the new Demon King and seized control of Narz'khal. The former king's daughter, Fina, was enslaved and now serves as a sex toy for the soldiers.

About the Comfort Women of Narz'khal:

Unlike humans, the people of Narz'khal possess the ability to absorb magical energy from their partners during sexual intercourse. This unique trait allows them to grow stronger by draining magic from others. As a result, individuals within the colonies who possess magical aptitude are selected and assigned as comfort women for the soldiers—used both to enhance the soldiers' combat strength and as a form of reward for their service.

Among all the comfort women, the most coveted is Fina, the former Demon King’s daughter. Blessed with an immense reservoir of magical power and a stunningly beautiful face, Fina provides soldiers with far more magical energy than any other woman. Her beauty and value make her the most sought-after toy among the ranks.

About the Village of Redmill:
